name: Country Dumpling Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the ribs into serving portions and season with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Melt shortening in a large kettle over medium heat. Add the ribs; cook until lightly browned on all sides.
3. Pour in 1 quart water, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 1 hour.
4. Stir in the sauerkraut and caraway seed, and let it simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
5. In a medium saucepan, mix together half a cup of water, half a cup of evaporated milk, instant potatoes, salt, baking powder, and egg. Bring to a boil, stirring until smooth, then remove from heat.
6. Add the sifted flour mixture to the potato mixture, stirring until well combined.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto the boiling sauerkraut over moderate heat for 5 minutes, then cover and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Serve immediately. Yield: 6 servings.
